import_story.title: Live Arcs Canon Gate Check
import_story.description: Plan 09 retro validation: real arc summary and canon synthesis.

steps.eval: for (const key of Object.keys(globalThis).filter((k) => k.startsWith('storyOrchestratorDebug'))) delete globalThis[key]; globalThis.storyOrchestratorRuntime.setExtractionSettings({ enabled: true, profileId: 'afcc7073-3510-4f67-8070-35ce449d4792', cadence: 6 }); return true;

const audit = (id) => ({ id, createdAt: new Date().toISOString(), priority: 0, reason: 'manual', contractHash: 'h', scope: [], window: { from: 0, to: 0 }, prompt: 'p', rawResponse: 'r', acceptedDeltas: [], rejected: [] }); const mk = (text) => ({ tier: 'facts', type: 'fact', importance: 2, expiration: 'permanent', entities: [], text, evidence: 'seed' }); await globalThis.storyOrchestratorRuntime.applyExtractionAudit(audit('seed-arcs'), [], [ mk('The guild ledger vanished from the locked archive overnight.'), mk('Luke was the last person seen near the archive.') ], [ { kind: 'open', text: 'Find who stole the guild ledger.' }, { kind: 'open', text: 'Repair the broken seal on the vault.' } ]); return globalThis.storyOrchestratorRuntime.getArcs().map((a) => ({ text: a.text, status: a.status }));

const audit = { id: 'resolve-arc', createdAt: new Date().toISOString(), priority: 0, reason: 'manual', contractHash: 'h', scope: [], window: { from: 0, to: 1 }, prompt: 'p', rawResponse: 'r', acceptedDeltas: [], rejected: [] }; await globalThis.storyOrchestratorRuntime.applyExtractionAudit(audit, [], [], [ { kind: 'resolved', text: 'Find who stole the guild ledger.' } ]); const arcs = globalThis.storyOrchestratorRuntime.getArcs(); if (!arcs.some((a) => a.status === 'resolved')) throw new Error('expected a resolved arc: ' + JSON.stringify(arcs)); return arcs.map((a) => ({ text: a.text, status: a.status }));

const ctx = SillyTavern.getContext(); const resolved = ctx.substituteParams('{{story_canon}}'); if (!resolved || resolved.includes('{{story_canon}}') || resolved.length < 20) throw new Error('macro did not resolve: ' + JSON.stringify(resolved?.slice(0, 100))); return resolved.slice(0, 200);
